message:
fix(jit): Use hardcoded paths instead of environment for CI compatibility

The previous fix using `which zig` still failed in CI because Zig's
ChildProcess can't inherit environment in Node.js addon context on Linux.

This fix:
1. Uses direct path checking instead of spawning `which` subprocess
2. Uses comprehensive hardcoded PATH covering GitHub Actions, homebrew,
   and common local installations
3. Avoids std.posix.getenv entirely to prevent Linux panics

The hardcoded paths include:
- /opt/hostedtoolcache/zig/0.15.2/x64/ (GitHub Actions setup-zig)
- /opt/homebrew/bin/ (macOS homebrew)
- /usr/local/bin/ (Linux/macOS)
- /home/runner/.local/bin/ (GitHub Actions runner)
